Pillar_Narratives.Currency & Liquidity Pressure: Currency markets and liquidity are experiencing moderate pressure due to persistent central bank policy uncertainty. The continued "Fed drama" can introduce volatility, impacting exchange rates and the availability of global credit.
Pillar_Narratives.Sanctions & Regulatory Fragmentation: The current geopolitical environment suggests an elevated risk of new sanctions and regulatory shifts. "US adopt bold new strategy in desperate attempt to win Iran war" indicates potential for significant policy changes that could fragment international trade and financial systems.

Pillar_Narratives.Climate & Resource Shock: This pillar currently reflects baseline activity, with no immediate, severe climate or resource-related shocks identified in the provided feed.
